prompts.best_for: Concept comparisons, value vs cost, philosophy contrasts, two-perspective arguments with detailed explanations
prompts.prompt: Professional corporate infographic slide design, comparison layout style. Top center bold headline {{TEXT_PLACEHOLDER_1}} followed by a centered introductory paragraph {{TEXT_PLACEHOLDER_2}}. Two distinct horizontal content sections stacked vertically with rounded corners and soft drop shadows. The top section is themed in bright cyan blue, featuring a circular icon on the left of a hand holding a diamond, a header bar labeled {{TEXT_PLACEHOLDER_3}}, and a block of body text. The bottom section is themed in muted red, featuring a circular icon on the left of a hand holding a dollar coin, a header bar labeled {{TEXT_PLACEHOLDER_4}}, and a block of body text. Clean light gray gradient background, flat vector illustration style, modern sans-serif typography, high readability, business presentation aesthetic.
prompts.layout: Vertical stack comparison layout. Centered header section followed by a 1-column grid containing two distinct, identical-height content cards. The cards utilize a split composition: icon visual on the left (approx 15% width) and text content on the right.
prompts.visual_hierarchy: 1. Main Headline 'Value Based vs Cost Based'. 2. The colored title bars (Blue vs Red) of the individual sections. 3. The iconography (Diamond/Coin). 4. Body text.
prompts.focal_point: The two colored horizontal bars (Cyan and Red) serve as the primary anchors, guiding the eye to the specific categories being compared.
prompts.white_space: Generous margins around the outer edges. Good internal padding within the gray content boxes, though the text is dense (Lorem Ipsum). The space between the two cards separates the concepts effectively.
prompts.balance: Symmetrical balance. The top and bottom cards are mirror images in terms of structure, creating a stable and formal corporate feel.

prompts.best_for: Binary opposites, success vs failure patterns, good vs bad habits, do vs don't lists
prompts.prompt: Professional infographic presentation slide, comparison layout titled 'Successful vs Unsuccessful People', flat vector design style. Center split composition: left side features a large bright lime green (#8DC63F) arrow-like hexagonal shape pointing inward containing {{TEXT_PLACEHOLDER_1}}, a circular icon with letter 'S', and a line-art trophy icon. Right side features a symmetrical pinkish-red (#E03E52) shape pointing inward containing {{TEXT_PLACEHOLDER_2}}, a circular icon with letter 'U', and a broken structure icon. Clean light gray background, subtle drop shadows, modern sans-serif typography, corporate aesthetic, soft diffuse lighting, high resolution.
prompts.layout: Symmetrical split-screen composition using opposing geometric shapes (modified hexagons/arrows) centered on a horizontal axis.
prompts.visual_hierarchy: 1. Main Title (Top) 2. Colored Shapes (Green vs Red) 3. Sub-headings (Successful/Unsuccessful) 4. Icons (S/U) 5. Body Text.
prompts.focal_point: The central convergence point where the green and red shapes nearly touch, creating visual tension.
prompts.white_space: Generous margins around the outer edges; however, the internal text content is dense with limited breathing room inside the colored shapes.
prompts.balance: Perfect symmetrical balance, utilizing color weight (green vs red) to create a sense of equal opposition.

prompts.best_for: Product or tool comparisons, feature-by-feature breakdowns, competitive analysis, side-by-side evaluations
prompts.prompt: Flat vector infographic template, dark mode corporate style. Symmetrical split-screen layout comparison chart. Left side emerald green theme, right side burnt orange theme. Central vertical divider text {{COMPARISON}}. Two large rounded header capsules {{PRODUCT 01}} and {{PRODUCT 02}}. Three bullet point sections per side with square icons. clean geometric sans-serif typography. Dark slate background #1F252D. High contrast, professional business presentation aesthetic. --ar 4:3 --v 6.0
prompts.layout: Strict symmetrical 2-column grid anchored by central vertical axis. Mirror-image containment areas.
prompts.visual_hierarchy: 1. Product Headers (Color Blocks) -> 2. Central 'Comparison' Divider -> 3. Bullet Point Headers -> 4. Body Text.
prompts.focal_point: The upper central area where the T-shaped divider meets the colored product headers.
prompts.white_space: Generous internal padding within outline containers. Consistent margins around text blocks to prevent clutter.
prompts.balance: Perfect symmetrical balance. Visual weight is equal on both sides due to identical shaping and text density.
